items.title: Managed Network Services Market Size to Surpass USD 122.77 Billion by 2032| SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The Managed Network Services Market is growing as businesses adopt outsourced solutions for secure, reliable, and cost-effective network management and optimization. The market is expected to reach $122.77 Billion by 2032, driven by increasing demands for secure, scalable, and cost-effective networking solutions.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: IBM is a major player in the managed network services market, offering solutions like IBM Managed Network Services and IBM Cloud Pak for Network Automation.
Cisco is a leading provider of managed network services, offering solutions like Cisco SD-WAN and Cisco Meraki Managed Network.
Ericsson is a prominent player in the managed network services market, offering solutions like Ericsson Managed Network Services and Ericsson Dynamic Orchestration.
Verizon is a major provider of managed network services, offering solutions like Verizon Managed SD-WAN and Verizon Secure Cloud Interconnect.
